description_long: This lounge setup features a cozy, plaid-upholstered armchair with two small, square, orange accent cushions, paired with a round, dark wood coffee table. The table holds a decorative arrangement of three colored balls and a small blue vase. Flanking the table are two terracotta potted plants with broad green leaves, adding a touch of nature to the ensemble. A vintage-style wooden television with antenna sits on a low, boxy stand, completing the retro urban vibe. The armchair has a high, slightly curved backrest and short, tapered legs, while the table stands on slender, curved legs. The overall grouping is ideal for a comfortable lounge area in a public or semi-public urban setting such as a parklet, sidewalk café, or community lounge.
description: A plaid armchair with orange cushions, a round dark wood coffee table with decor, two potted plants, and a vintage TV on a wooden stand, arranged as a cozy urban lounge set.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the armchair, the round table with decor, and the alignment of the TV and potted plants behind.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the plaid armchair with cushions, the round table with decor, two potted plants, and the TV on its stand, all clearly visible in a row.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the back of the armchair, the table's edge, and the vertical alignment of the TV and plants.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the armchair, the table, and the backs of the potted plants and TV, with less detail on the decor.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two small, loose, square orange cushions placed symmetrically on the backrest of the armchair.
attribute_backrest_design: Tall, slightly curved rectangular backrest with a continuous plaid pattern and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Absent; the armchair has no visible armrests.
attribute_leg_style: Short, straight, dark wooden legs, slightly tapered and set at the corners of the armchair base.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Plaid patterned upholstery in muted brown and beige tones, with visible fabric texture and no tufting.
